message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Program" as Program
participant "V4L2" as V4L2
participant "Bridge CX3" as Bridge
participant "Camera OV5640" as Camera

rectangle "Initialization" {
  Program -> V4L2 : 1 OpenDevice(/dev/video0)
  V4L2 -> Bridge : 2
  Bridge -> Camera : 3
  Camera --> Bridge : 4
  Bridge --> V4L2 : 5
  V4L2 --> Program : 6
  Program -> Bridge : 7 InitDevice()
  Bridge -> Camera : 8
  Camera --> Bridge : 9
  Bridge --> V4L2 : 10
  V4L2 --> Program : 11
  Program --> V4L2 : 12
}

rectangle "Test" {
  Program -> Bridge : 13 SetParameter(valueA)
  Bridge -> Bridge : 14 valueA
  Bridge -> Camera : 15 valueA
  Camera --> Bridge : 16
  Bridge --> Program : 17
  Program --> Bridge : 18
  Program -> Bridge : 19 GetParameter()
  Bridge -> Bridge : 20
  Bridge -> Camera : 21
  Camera --> Bridge : 22 value
  Bridge --> Program : 23 value
  note right of Program : value must be equal to ValueA
  Program --> Bridge : 24 value
  Program -> Bridge : 25 StartStream()
  Bridge -> Bridge : 26
  Bridge -> Camera : 27
  Camera --> Bridge : 28
  Bridge --> Program : 29
  Program --> Bridge : 30
  Program -> Bridge : 31 GetParameter()
  Bridge -> Bridge : 32
  Bridge -> Camera : 33
  Camera --> Bridge : 34 value
  Bridge --> Program : 35 value
  note right of Program : value must be equal to ValueA
  Program --> Bridge : 36 value
  Program -> Bridge : 37 SetParameter(valueB)
  Bridge -> Bridge : 38 valueB
  Bridge -> Camera : 39 valueB
  Camera --> Bridge : 40
  Bridge --> Program : 41
  Program --> Bridge : 42
  Program -> Bridge : 43 GetParameter()
  Bridge -> Bridge : 44
  Bridge -> Camera : 45
  Camera --> Bridge : 46 value
  Bridge --> Program : 47 value
  note right of Program : value must be equal to ValueB
  Program --> Bridge : 48 value
  Program -> Bridge : 49 StopStream()
  Bridge -> Bridge : 50
  Bridge -> Camera : 51
  Camera --> Bridge : 52
  Bridge --> Program : 53
  Program --> Bridge : 54
  Program -> Bridge : 55 GetParameter()
  Bridge -> Bridge : 56
  Bridge -> Camera : 57
  Camera --> Bridge : 58 value
  Bridge --> Program : 59 value
  note right of Program : value must be equal to ValueB
  Program --> Bridge : 60 value
}

rectangle "Destruction" {
  Program -> V4L2 : 61 CloseDevice()
  V4L2 -> Bridge : 62
  Bridge -> Camera : 63
  Camera --> Bridge : 64
  Bridge --> V4L2 : 65
  V4L2 --> Program : 66
}

@enduml
